name: chrX_Xq13_XIC_XIST_TSIX_locus
description: Xq13.2 X-inactivation centre (XIC) hosting XIST/TSIX non-coding RNAs. Carries short tandem SDs (DXZ4 macrosatellite at ~115 Mb is functionally linked but physically separate) and intergenic SDs around RLIM/JPX/FTX. The XIC is the master regulator of mammalian dosage compensation.

architecture.internal_structure: XIST (17 kb ncRNA) + antisense TSIX; FTX, JPX regulatory ncRNAs; short interspersed SDs.
